figures.caption: Figure 3 SigQTL results (a) Manhattan plot of the mutational signatures activity GWAS applied to the harmonized DFCI panel. The x-axis represents the variant's genomic position, the y-axis represents the -log10(pvalue) of the linear regression models of change in the average SBS7 activity in meta-samples between genotypes at each germline variant. The dotted red line represents the standard GWAS threshold − log (5 × 10 ). SigQTLs in locus 16q24.3 are represented as triangles,
